notes: Core mechanics are present (barrels, ladders, hammer, scoring) but barrel movement is erratic/unreliable, ladder climbing detection is finicky, and the visual layout lacks authentic Donkey Kong feel with simplified blocky sprites and non-standard girder arrangement.
An incredibly solid and faithful recreation using canvas shapes; physics, barrel routing, and hammer mechanics are surprisingly accurate to the arcade original.
Playable and mostly stable, but it is a simplified Donkey Kong with inaccurate level structure/sprites and some mechanic shortcomings around ladders, jumping, and overall authenticity.
